content: Independent reviews blocked the full positive-case proof because the broad inverse mixed-volume quotient convexity input was unsupported. The report was revised to mark only m=1 and m=n as verified positive cases, m=0 as disproved, and 2<=m<=n-1 as the active proof gap.
uncertainty: The candidate classification 1<=m<=n remains plausible but unproved for 2<=m<=n-1.

content: Added fixed-seed computation logs for axis-aligned boxes and random zonotopes. No computation is used as proof of the intermediate positive cases.
uncertainty: Random searches can miss counterexamples and only serve as sanity checks.

content: Reduced the intermediate cases to an explicit second-variation inequality for A=D_L^{m-1}B over B=V(K[n-1],L), after primitive decomposition of support-function directions.
uncertainty: The local strengthened Hodge-Riemann inequality stated in the artifact has not yet been proved or sourced.

content: Proved the special intermediate case n=3,m=2 by reducing the second derivative to a Lorentzian bilinear-form Cauchy-Schwarz inequality on the primitive hyperplane.
uncertainty: This proves the full classification through dimension 3, but does not yet prove the remaining n>=4 intermediate cases.

content: Recorded close literature routes for the remaining quotient-convexity gap. Collins' Hessian quotient concavity has the exact formal quotient but only on a solvable set; Lehmann-Xiao and Kerner-Nemethi provide nearby inequalities that do not directly imply the needed signed local second-variation inequality.
uncertainty: No checked source yet proves the remaining n>=4 intermediate cases on the full convex-body cone.

content: Added a fixed-seed local Hessian search for shared-direction zonotope cones. It found no negative Hessian eigenvalues in the tested n=4,5 intermediate cases.
uncertainty: This is only a finite-dimensional numerical sanity check and is not proof of the remaining cases.

content: Found and recorded bivariate volume-polynomial counterexamples for every n>=4 intermediate case. The revised classification is m=1, m=n, or the exceptional case (n,m)=(3,2).
uncertainty: A fresh independent reviewer must check the Shephard realization invocation and product-lifting argument before completion.

content: Citation review approved the Branden-Huh/Shephard negative-case provenance but blocked completion until exact positive-case sources were added for the m=n endpoint and the n=3,m=2 Lorentzian signature input.
uncertainty: Positive-case provenance needed concrete local theorem references.

content: Added exact positive-case provenance: Wang Theorem 2.7 and Lemma 2.5 for the m=n mixed-volume Brunn-Minkowski endpoint; Branden-Leake Lemma 2.3 and Corollary 6.6 for Lorentzian signature/primitive semidefiniteness in n=3,m=2.
uncertainty: Needs citation re-review after the provenance patch.

content: Citation follow-up approved the source-to-claim alignment for the revised classification, including positive cases and the bivariate negative chain.
Archived obsolete blocking reviews in a durable markdown note because they applied to superseded reports and the harness treats any blocking JSON in reviews as active.
Workstream completion gate passed after independent logic and citation approvals. Marked workstream status complete.
